ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-12-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: ELLEN CHAITIN, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. FIELDS, #7235

The Court requires an Order for Dispensing Notice to Father.
The matter is continued.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-17-2011 Reset To May-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514 For Order To Show Cause
